title: atomic-skills Initiative frontmatter (schemaVersion 0.1/0.2)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of nested phase files at `.atomic-skills/projects/<project-id>/<plan-slug>/phases/f<N>-*.md`, with legacy flat `.atomic-skills/initiatives/<slug>.md` accepted during migration. Current initiative writers prefer schemaVersion 0.1; 0.2 remains accepted for explicitly upgraded files. Mirrors aideck/src/schemas/project-status.ts:Initiative + Task. The `body` field of the TypeScript Initiative interface lives in the markdown body, NOT frontmatter — so it is not declared here. Standalone initiatives are represented as a degenerate one-phase plan in the nested layout; legacy flat standalone files omit `parentPlan` and `phaseId`.

summary.description: Concise one-line human summary of what this phase does (mirrors the plan phase descriptor's `summary`). Authored + user-validated at phase generation; shown on the dashboard Home (Agora callout).

businessIntent.description: F0/T-001 (phase-materialization): the load-bearing business spine — value/workflow/rules/outOfScope/doneWhen — authored + user-validated when the phase is materialized (D1 strong-lazy), persisted on both the plan phase descriptor and the initiative file (F-001), and surfaced for the materialize gate (D4). Optional + additive (mirrors `summary`): an absent block means a not-yet-activated/legacy surface. `derived[]` captures open questions + tentative answers (never gated). scripts/find-missing-business-intent.js (T-003) hard-blocks a materialized phase missing any spine field.

startedCommit.description: C-3 (earned-value integrity): the immutable git HEAD SHA at phase activation, recorded so phase-done actuals compute from a rebase/squash/amend-proof commit anchor instead of the fragile `started` committer-date heuristic. Optional + additive: absent on legacy phases, which degrade to the date heuristic. Consumed by scripts/append-completion.js computePhaseActuals via `--actuals-since-commit`.

tasksDone.description: Rollup precomputed by the project-status skill: count of tasks with status 'done'. Powers dashboard progress meters (aiDeck stays read-in-place / no compute engine). Recompute on every task mutation; see scripts/compute-rollups.js.

weightDone.description: Rollup precomputed by scripts/compute-rollups.js: sum of weight (default 1 per weightless task) over tasks with status 'done'. Weighted mirror of tasksDone for the earned-value burn-up (F2).

weightTotal.description: Rollup: sum of weight (default 1 per weightless task) over all tasks. Weighted mirror of tasksTotal.

gatesMet.description: Rollup: count of exitGates with status 'met'.

planActive.description: Derived focus marker (scripts/reconcile-focus.js): true iff this initiative's parent plan has status 'active'. Scopes the Home timeline to active plans (the dashboard can't join plan→initiative). Never hand-authored.

current.description: Derived focus marker (scripts/reconcile-focus.js): true iff planActive AND this is the plan's currentPhase — i.e. the single 'AGORA' phase. Powers the Home focus callout. Never hand-authored.

planTitle.description: Derived denormalization (scripts/reconcile-focus.js): the parent plan's `title`. Lets a repeat-grouped widget (grouped by the parentPlan slug) label the group with the human plan title instead of the slug (the dashboard can't join plan→initiative). Never hand-authored.

summary.description: Concise one-line human summary of what this task does — distinct from the label `title` and the longer `description`. Authored + user-validated at decompose (and whenever a task is created mid-execution); shown on the dashboard Home (Agora task table) and the Initiative-detail tasks table. Generated in the install-configured language; backfill detector = scripts/find-missing-task-summaries.js. Never hand-authored as a one-off outside the skill loop (skills/core/project.md → Task summaries).

weight.description: Complexity proxy for the earned-value burn-up (F2). Optional; absent ⇒ treated as 1 (count-burnup degradation). AI-authored at decompose (Stage 6 of project-create-plan.md) from structural signals (# of acceptance, Files, scopeBoundary, verifier kind); decompose.js stays frozen (R-ORCH-10). Backfill detector = scripts/find-unweighted-tasks.js. Summed into the weightDone/weightTotal rollups.

scopeBoundary.description: Explicit exclusions — what this task must NOT do. Prevents scope creep at the task level.

acceptance.description: Executable acceptance criteria in it()-style assertions. Max 5 items.

evidence.description: 0.2 (F-B4): captured result of running this task's `verifier` on `done <task-id>`, reusing the exact exitCriterion.evidence shape. Replaces the v0.1 description-note string-laundering workaround so per-task verifier results are machine-enforceable (GATE-R2).

allOf.description: Tasks added mid-execution (with provenance) must articulate WHY via context. Original-materialization tasks live without context — their narrative is the plan/initiative body.
